articles.title: DEV-FRIENDLY
articles.summary: Every growing B2B SaaS needs solid auth and user management. The problem? Building it in-house drains engineering resources from the product your customers actually use.

articles.title: INSIDE REPLIT'S BREAKOUT GROWTH: LESSONS FROM $2.8M TO $150M ARR
articles.summary: Replit's marketing and strategic lifecycle systems mirror strategies used at ClickUp. The company emphasizes cohesive product launches, lifecycle-driven velocity, and community engagement to convert organic energy into structured growth. The disciplined approach linked product features like the Replit Agent to organic and content-driven campaigns, significantly enhancing activation, retention, and conversion rates.

articles.title: PSIQUANTUM RAISES $1 BILLION TO BUILD MILLION-QUBIT SCALE, FAULT-TOLERANT QUANTUM COMPUTERS
articles.summary: PsiQuantum secured $1 billion in Series E funding to develop million-qubit fault-tolerant quantum computers. The funding will enable the company to establish quantum computing sites in Brisbane and Chicago and validate its systems architecture. New investors include BlackRock, Temasek, and NVIDIA's venture arm, valuing PsiQuantum at $7 billion.

articles.title: WHY FOUNDERS FAIL AND WHY YOU NEED TO RUN TOWARD FEAR
articles.summary: Ben Horowitz, co-founder of a16z, emphasizes that successful founders make many small, difficult decisions rather than relying on one big moment. He advises CEOs to act decisively in tough situations and prioritize finding great talent over fixing underperformers. Horowitz also discusses the underestimated potential in AI startups and highlights the importance of embracing challenges to avoid failure.

articles.title: GITHUB CEO THOMAS DOHMKE ON COPILOT, VIBE CODING, AND AI'S NEXT CHAPTER
articles.summary: GitHub CEO Thomas Dohmke discusses AI's lasting impact on coding, highlighting GitHub Copilot's role in the AI coding boom. He emphasizes the importance of competition from newer platforms like Cursor and Windsurf. Dohmke also ponders how AI will continue transforming the role of software engineers.

articles.title: 7 PRODUCT STRATEGY EXAMPLES
articles.summary: A B2C finance app strategy centers on behavioral design and habit nudges to drive goal completion, using a measurable North Star metric and a Now‐Next‐Later roadmap structure. A compliance automation product prioritizes modular onboarding for frameworks, proactive alerts, and quarterly customer roundtables, aligning legal and product goals. A freelancer-client marketplace leans into quality and trust with verified matches, dispute handling, and user-informed roadmaps to boost retention and project outcomes.

articles.title: WHY YOUR AI PRODUCT NEEDS A DIFFERENT DEVELOPMENT LIFECYCLE
articles.summary: AI products require a different development lifecycle compared to traditional software due to their non-deterministic nature and the balance between agency and control. The Continuous Calibration/Continuous Development (CC/CD) framework helps address these challenges by continuously refining system behavior and gradually granting more autonomy. This approach ensures stability, user trust, and the successful scaling of AI products.

articles.title: THESE AI AGENTS TURN SLACK INTO A PRODUCTIVITY POWERHOUSE
articles.summary: Getting lost in endless threads and channels? Always context switching to find the information you need? Make Slack actually-good with Zest [11] - AI Coworkers who know your tools. Ask for a quick update before a demo, escalate a ticket, or get a breakdown of what's

articles.title: OPENMEMORY MCP
articles.summary: OpenMemory MCP is a private memory service for MCP-compatible AI tools, enabling them to securely store, retrieve, and share session context locally or via a hosted cloud.

articles.title: KNOWLEDGE
articles.summary: Knowledge is an AI sales intelligence platform that uses behavioral data and psychometrics to identify in-market buyers and coach teams on personalized, high-converting outreach.

articles.title: NARROW
articles.summary: Narrow is a smart LinkedIn inbox that organizes messages, follow-ups, and prospecting in a clean, kanban-style dashboard for founders, sales teams, and job seekers.

articles.title: WHY MORE STARTUPS ARE BUYING OTHER STARTUPS IN 2025
articles.summary: Startups are increasingly acquiring other startups due to challenging fundraising environments and affordable valuations. In the first half of 2025, M&A deals rose 18% year-on-year, driven by companies looking to access new technologies or consolidate market positions. Notable transactions include OpenAI's $6.5 billion acquisition of Io and Ripple's $1.25 billion purchase of Hidden Road.

articles.title: HOW TOP VCS ARE REALLY INVESTING IN AI APPLICATIONS (AND WHAT IT MEANS FOR YOUR SAAS STRATEGY)
articles.summary: Jacob Efron of Redpoint Ventures emphasizes that AI companies scale faster than traditional SaaS due to plummeting model costs and advises focusing on four AI use cases: chat, document processing, speech, and coding. Redpoint's investment strategy evaluates AI by examining market wedge potential, industry expansion capability, and market quality demands. The rapid evolution of AI necessitates a swift adaptation and integration into SaaS to maintain competitiveness, with Redpoint highlighting marketing AI as a promising yet underdeveloped area.

articles.title: HOW TO ACTUALLY DECIDE
articles.summary: Focus on defining decision criteria and evaluating options quantitatively. Use techniques like cost-benefit analysis and expected value to make informed choices. Prioritize clarity and consistency in decision-making processes.

articles.title: 3 MARKETS FUELING THE SHIFT TO AGENTIC COMMERCE
articles.summary: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) enhances AI platform visibility, with nearly 40% of players launching recently.

articles.title: INDUSTRIAL AUTOMATION AI READINESS: HOW SIEMENS, HITACHI, AND ABB ARE BUILDING THE INDUSTRIAL AI FOUNDATION
articles.summary: Siemens, Hitachi, and ABB advance industrial AI by integrating automation and AI technologies.

articles.title: HOW AI HAS CHANGED THE RULES OF SAAS: WHAT EVERY FOUNDER NEEDS TO KNOW. A LIVE DEEP DIVE
articles.summary: AI is transforming the SaaS landscape, fundamentally altering scaling and growth strategies for founders.
